global-ESN KHAS and Buddy System

was founded in 2008. In the beginning, ESN Kadir Has had only one Erasmus student. During the years of 2015-2016, it has welcomed more than 90 Erasmus students and reached its highest student number.

ESN Kadir Has has always been together with its Erasmus students, firstly, providing help with course registrations and residence permit, also organizing many fun events and trips. With its local board and members, ESN Kadir Has is always ready to welcome and help Erasmus students.

For more, please visit

https://esnturkey.org/content/esn-kadir-has
